items.name: Aloo Paratha
items.description: Wholewheat flatbread stuffed with spiced mashed potato, hand-rolled and slow-cooked on a tawa with butter. Served with fresh curd and homemade pickle.

items.name: Paneer Paratha
items.description: Wholewheat flatbread stuffed with crumbled fresh paneer mixed with home-ground spices and green chilli. Rich, filling, and utterly satisfying.

items.name: Cheese Paneer Paratha
items.description: Our classic paneer paratha loaded with melted cheese for extra indulgence. A crowd favourite.

items.name: Thepla (2 pcs)
items.description: Soft, golden Gujarati-style flatbread spiced with fenugreek and carom seeds. Perfect with homemade pickle or fresh curd.

items.name: Butter Thepla (2 pcs)
items.description: Classic thepla finished hot off the tawa with a generous layer of fresh butter.

items.name: Chai (2 cups)
items.description: Freshly brewed masala chai — ginger, cardamom, cloves — simmered the old-fashioned homestyle way.

items.name: Roti (2 pcs)
items.description: Soft, puffed wholewheat rotis made fresh to order. Light and wholesome.

items.name: Roti (10 pcs)
items.description: A family pack of 10 soft wholewheat rotis. Perfect for family meals or meal prep.

items.name: Butter Roti (2 pcs)
items.description: Soft wholewheat rotis finished with a generous spread of fresh butter.

items.name: Butter Roti (10 pcs)
items.description: A family pack of 10 buttery wholewheat rotis — great value for family dinners.

items.name: Paneer Bhurji
items.description: Crumbled fresh paneer scrambled with golden onions, ripe tomatoes, and home-ground spices. Rich and protein-packed.

items.name: Paneer Butter Masala
items.description: Soft paneer cubes bathed in a rich, velvety tomato-butter gravy — fragrant with whole spices and cream.

items.name: Kaju Paneer Masala
items.description: Creamy cashew and paneer curry in a mildly spiced, nutty gravy. Indulgent and perfect for special occasions.

items.name: Daal Khichdi
items.description: Rice and yellow lentils cooked together until soft and nourishing. Light on the stomach, heavy on comfort.

items.name: Tadka Daal Khichdi
items.description: Classic daal khichdi elevated with a sizzling ghee-cumin tadka poured on top.

items.name: Sabudana Khichdi
items.description: Fasting-friendly sabudana pearls tossed with peanuts, green chilli, and curry leaves.

items.name: Sabudana Khichdi + Farali Chevdo
items.description: Sabudana khichdi served alongside crispy farali chevdo — a satisfying fasting combo.

items.name: Sabudana Wada (4 pcs)
items.description: Crispy-fried sabudana and potato fritters — golden outside, soft inside. Maharashtrian fasting classic.

items.name: Farali Chutney
items.description: Tangy, cooling green chutney made for fasting days — no onion, no garlic, all flavour.

items.name: Maggie
items.description: Classic masala Maggie noodles cooked the way every Indian grew up eating. Simple, nostalgic, always hits the spot.

items.name: Butter Maggie
items.description: Masala Maggie finished with a generous pat of butter stirred in at the end. Richer, silkier, better.

items.name: Cheese Maggie
items.description: Maggie noodles smothered in melted cheese — gooey, indulgent, and impossible to stop eating.

items.name: Tadka Maggie
items.description: Maggie with a hot spiced tadka of onions, tomatoes, and whole spices. A street-food upgrade at home.

items.name: Cheese Tadka Maggie
items.description: The ultimate Maggie — spiced tadka finish plus a blanket of melted cheese. Our most-ordered noodle dish.

items.name: Curd
items.description: Fresh homemade curd — cool, creamy, and the perfect sidekick to any paratha or sabji.

items.name: Butter
items.description: A generous side of fresh butter. Because everything is better with butter.
